steps: Enter your email address and choose a password, then click 'Sign Up'
Verify your email address by clicking the link in the confirmation email
Your API key is displayed on the dashboard at https://www.weatherapi.com/my/
Copy the API key — it is passed as a query parameter named 'key' in all API requests

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your WeatherAPI.com API key (passed as ?key= query parameter)

notes: Free tier available: 1 million calls/month, 3-day forecast, no credit card required
Paid plans unlock 14-day forecasts, historical data, and marine/air quality data
The API key is passed as a URL query parameter (?key=YOUR_KEY), not in the header
Supports JSON and XML response formats

test_endpoint.description: Get current weather for London to verify the API key
